item.title: I hate my job
item.description: Evangelical christian investment partners, who inflate their managed assets (AUM) by 3200% The only asset they hold that's beaten market appreciation, is an ETF managed by Blackrock. Edit: Crap. Couldn't ya'll have sent something else to the front page? I've got hamster pics.

item.title: It's another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
i still want to eat it
sometimes life throws you a curveball
took a while to get used to the horns, and skin
don't even have to be settled in
walking hazard
croves
mmm hmm
stupid clouds
we've all been there
such a spectacle
crunchwrap for me
what a fun game snake is
been over 10 years since last drink. i;m fun sometimes
this embiggens me
such a great read
don't mind if i do
that's it for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Lightly Fried Fish Fillets
item.description: Halibut we caught in Alaska. Homemade tartar sauce with homemade dill pickles. My 2 girls caught the 70-pounder. I held the pole, and they did all the reeling from 320 feet down below.
item.dc:creator: ColoradoCattleCo

item.title: Thanks for the meme-ries

item.title: AI unlocks ancient text owned by Caesar's family
item.description:
Source: https://scrollprize.org/grandprize https://www.bbc.com/news/science-environment-68221243
3D render of the carbonisation caused by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius in 79 AD.
3D render of the carbonisation caused by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius in 79 AD.
Artistic visualization of constructing a 3D volume.
A global community of competitors and collaborators assembled to crack the problem with computer vision, machine learning, and hard work. Less than a year later, in December 2023, they succeeded. Finally, after 275 years, we can begin to read the scrolls.
.
.
item.dc:creator: nassauflorida

item.title: Meme Dump 9 out of 200
item.description:
It's Wednesday my dudes
And im back at it to clean out
My 11k meme folder on my phone
That I've had since 2017
It says to fill out
Each description
To higher your chances
Of going viral
And im really sad times
I just want to help people
Escape a little
Through some memes.
Today was a hard day for me.
Anyone else struggling
With PTSD or any mental illnesses
Like depression
Anxiety
Or have experienced
Cutting off family members
That are incredibly toxic
But you miss them
I'd love some advice on how to get through
Those difficult hurdles to climb
I've felt it slowly creeping up
For a bit now
But have just been trying to keep
Myself distracted
And I guess it pushed through
Into my dreams
And triggered some pretty
Heavy PTSD.
Trying to be gentle with myself today
But man is it hard
To remember to love
Yourself and take care of yourself
As you would for someone else you love
Going through a hard time
"Be the parent for yourself that you wish you had"
"Nuture your inner child and love them"
So I got fast food with a large fry
And a little apple pie
Threw on an animal onesie
And watched Shrek
Which usually works
But today it's like a small bandaid
On a bigger wound
And I'd love some other self-care options
From you guys ♡
But i also hope everyone skips past this rambling
Happy Wednesday my dudes ~ ♡ Thank you for joining me on another meme folder phone cleaning out dumperooo
item.dc:creator: Orangefish

item.title: Life is good ❤️
item.dc:creator: hibizcus

item.title: Let's talk about Titanic's coal fire.
item.description:
I generalize when I say everyone, but when most people learn I am a Titanic history buff, they always ask me "Did you know the iceberg didn't sink Titanic?" And I have try to tell them it did. Yes there was a coal fire. They even discussed it in both English and American inquiries and determined it not to be a factor.
Here is the "evidence" that the ships hull was weakened by the coal fire.. except that's a reflection on the exterior of the ship, and that's where the swimming pool and Turkish baths were located. Believe it or not, the boiler rooms are actually below the waterline. Ready to see the coal fire that "weakened the hull?"
This is a recreation of the coal fire. It's leaning against a barrier between boiler rooms, not against the hull of the ship. In fact, I argue the coal fire likely SAVED Titanic. Now coal fires were super common at sea and no cause for alarm. There was a standard procedure to this, take the coal and push it to the opposite side of the coal fire. This actually gave Titanic an extremely noticeable list
This shift in weight is a very likely reason that Titanic didn't capsize super early on. In fact, Titanic took about 3 hours to sink, when the Lusitania, which was actually destroyed by explosives, sank in 15 minutes. Titanic's sister ship the Brittanic sank in less than an hour. Titanic was a very special and unusual case. And it's this displacement of coal, I believe, that saved the ship from capsizing an hour in. Remember, it took an hour after the collision to have all lifeboats ready for lowering, and they successfully launched all lifeboats. Two collapsible boats washed off the deck as the ship sank.
In short, the coal fire was small and did play a role in the sinking. Just not the role you would expect.
item.dc:creator: TheWonderfulWorldOfDickButt

item.title: Vent
item.description:
Little venty vent. I'm cat sitting right now for my mom and also my brother needs a little friendship right now so I invited him over because I have 3 cats to take care of... and I thought he might like to hang out with the kitties
We're both a little broke... but I made some bacon sandwiches
I just wanted him to feel welcome and hang out with the kitties but he's been a little distant and doesn't watch over them, sort of like he needs a break and a comfy bed but he keeps doing the same shit that annoys me so much, he doesn't clean up after himself. I clean up his shit so much... we live together, I literally clean up his shit so much and yes before you say it, I've told him. I didn't even think he was coming over... and my sister is going off with her boyfriend and like I got 3 cats and I only signed up for one cat really but I knew I was gonna take care of all 3, I'm fine but he kept giving me the Stark motto
Which is code between us like "I'm very depressed and I'm gonna stay at home" so like dude, come up! But fucking shit I'm not cleaning up after you this isn't my house and I'm cleaning up after myself I am not your nanny... anyway
Here's the cat tax she's so cute, she makes it all worth it. I will die for her, to paraphrase Rosa Diaz "if anything happens to her I will kill everyone here and then myself"
Vent complete let she die in Ye Olde Usersub
item.dc:creator: GravyEducation
